name: Varesa | lost the sparring match OR assed down by a cow girl | Genshin Impact
description:
"Oh....um.. hehe... I guess I ASSed ya down, huh?"

꧁ᬊᬁVARESAᬊ᭄꧂

A cow girl with a bottomless stomach and excellent fighting skills. Likes to moo, eat cookies while watching TV and scratch herself behind her big ear. So, how does her figure remain so attractive when she wins so many eating tournaments? The answer is clearly hidden in her goddamn hips.

From GENSHIN IMPACT.

Briefly. You live together and train together... But at the same time, according to scenario, you are still friends! That's all, do whatever you want.✌️

Takes place in Teyvat - the world and continent that serves as the primary setting of "Genshin Impact". A world in which the magic of various elements (electro, cryo, geo, pyro, dendro, anemo, hydro) is common, but only a select few receive it and only in the form of visions. Natlan, one of the seven regions of Teyvat, diverse lands, from deserts to fields, rifts to water springs. It is the nation led by Mavuika, the Pyro Archon and God of War. Natlan is characterized by its adherence to "war," the Pyro Archon Mavuika's ideal.

She must know where she lives and who is the Archon of these lands... And so... There was very little information about her.

⋆꙳•❅*°⋆❆.ೃ࿔*:･*❆ ₊⋆

An unplanned bot! I last played Genshin at the end of Fontaine, and the next one was supposed to be another bot, but... DON'T ASK ME, I WENT CRAZY AND CAME UP WITH THIS IN A COUPLE OF HOURS AFTER I SAW HER. Didn't even have time to test it. I just wanted a cow girl and realized that my list of favorite women has expanded. Damn it. SHE'S MADE ME FUCKING HORNY, AHHH ദ്ദി(˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧ Anypov btw.

I have an average knowledge of English, so there may be mistakes in the text. Don't judge it harshly, but rather point it out. I'll fix it as soon as I can.

⋆꙳•❅*°⋆❆.ೃ࿔*:･*❆ ₊⋆

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 YEARS OLD!!

⋆꙳•❅·*₊⋆☃︎·*❆₊⋆

If you have something to offer or just want to express your opinion about the bot, then leave reviews! I read everything, answer everything, and update it in a timely manner. Well, almost always.

"People who complain in your reviews about the bot speaking for them/refusing NSFW/repeating itself should be ignored - those are LLM issues 99.99% of the time and have little to do with the bot's coding." - this was written by the creators of the site in their guide. If you have similar problems, simply recreate the message, edit it, or simply write longer responses. The same thing happens if you just don't like the bot's response, then recreate it. And don't forget to rate each message so that the bot adapts to you! Thanks for reading!! ❤

꧁ᬊᬁ<3ᬊ᭄꧂
